subcodes.first_line: O Nightingale of the Abhá Garden! Though during this lengthy period thou hast composed verses with utmost eloquence and perfection of style [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عندلیب حدیقه ابهی در این مدت مدیده هر چند با کمال فصاحت و بلاغت قصائد
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow, @music and singing, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
